title: CojiKing's Dark Theme+
description: Beautiful Dark Mode GUI with a few QoL improvements
body:
Made with soul for myself, but wanted to share with those who want something a bit darker than others' packs.



The pack includes:

- colorful XP line,

- replaced vanilla hearts to hardcore ones(just for fun and better visibility if you have trouble seeing how many hearts you have while withered),

- lower shields,

- replaced totem texture(for better visibility purposes too),

- added extended HUD for brewing stand to see recipes for potions.



I have no plans for future updates yet, except updating the existing GUI to new versions of Minecraft. But you can still leave a comment and maybe I'll add this to the new version of the resource pack.

For bug repots, questions or suggestions, feel free to contact me in **Discord: CojiKing**.
